title: RNAlater Recipe
author: Rex Malmstrom
license_note: Confirmed via CrossRef DOI metadata: dx.doi.org/10.17504/protocols.io.8ifhubn

steps.title: Prepare 0
steps.instruction: Prepare 0.5 M EDTA 0.5M EDTA by Bonnie Poulos

steps.title: Prepare 1 M Sodium citrate 1M...
steps.instruction: Prepare 1 M Sodium citrate 1M Sodium citrate by Bonnie Poulos

steps.title: In a 2 or 3 L...
steps.instruction: In a 2 or 3 L flask mix 1,400 mL MilliQ water with 60 mL 0.5M EDTA and 37.5 mL 1M sodium citrate with stirring

steps.title: While continuing to stir the solution, add 1
steps.instruction: While continuing to stir the solution, add 1.05 kg (= 1,050 g) Ammonium sulfate in 100 g amounts. Ammonium sulfate Contributed by users Catalog #97061-184

steps.title: Stir ~30 min on hot plate...
steps.instruction: Stir ~30 min on hot plate set to low 00:30:00 It is possible that a tiny amount ammonium sulfate will not go into solution. This is okay; the most important thing is to have a saturated ammonium sulfate solution. Crystals should dissolve in ~30min.

steps.title: Allow solution to cool at room...
steps.instruction: Allow solution to cool at room temperature for at least 30min, but overnight on bench is best 00:30:00

steps.title: Filter solution through 0
steps.instruction: Filter solution through 0.2 μm filter to remove particles

steps.title: Store at room temp or at 4°C
steps.instruction: Store at room temp or at 4°C
